SPY.correlation_interpretation: Moderate negative co-movement at multi-week to multi-month horizons (levels ≈ -0.10 to -0.20); daily correlation weaker but nonlinear dependence exists (distance corr ≈0.39 for changes).
SPY.lead_lag_interpretation: Peak correlation is contemporaneous (lag 0). Modest evidence of short (1–3 day) credit leading in some windows, but tournament and LP results show essentially no reliable multi-day lead — practical lead advantage ≈ 0 days.
SPY.stress_sensitivity_interpretation: Very high: spread widening strongly associated with equity drawdowns and volatility spikes in stress states (GJR-GARCH economic magnitude large; regime/Q4 performance drastically worse). HY-IG primarily signals regime/stress state rather than steady alpha.
SPY.causality_interpretation: Weak-to-moderate and regime-dependent. Toda‑Yamamoto and transfer-entropy show bidirectional flow but credit→equity causality activates mainly in stress; equity→credit dominates in calm. Local projections show weak incremental forward predictive power once controls added.
